# HashKey Exchange

> HashKey Exchange is Hong Kong's first and largest SFC-licensed retail cryptocurrency exchange (SFC Type 1 + Type 7 licences). Established 2018. HKEX-listed (3887.HK, December 2025).

## About
- Regulatory status: SFC VATP licence, AMLO registered, ISO 27001/27701 certified
- Products: Spot trading (BTC, ETH, USDT and approved assets), staking, OTC desk
- Jurisdiction: Hong Kong retail and professional investors

## Bitcoin Pizza Day 2026
- Event: The 10,001st Slice — Bitcoin Pizza Day activation, 22 May 2026, Central HK
- Airdrop: 10,001 HKX token slices, KYC-verified accounts, BTC price trigger at 20:10 HKT
- Community: Rest in Blockchain memorial wall — https://beltran12138.github.io/hkx/rib/
- Telegram: @HashKey0xU (survivor community + Dark Chapter Confession mechanic)

## Developer Resources
- SkillHub: https://beltran12138.github.io/hkx/
- hkx CLI: https://github.com/Beltran12138/hkx (npm install -g hkx)
- KYA Agent Registry: https://beltran12138.github.io/hkx/agents/
